summary: A TSA PreCheck promo built entirely from blue-tinted airport B-roll stills with large white text-card overlays ('DID YOU KNOW', enrollment steps, '99% wait less than 10 minutes'). It is a plain informational slideshow promo with no music-driven editing or genre styling and no youth/pop-culture appeal.
notable_text: DID YOU KNOW; TSA PreCheck; 99% of TSA PreCheck passengers wait less than 10 minutes; TO ENROLL: Apply Online / Visit an Enrollment Location / Get your Known Traveler Number
